name: Amplitude Experiment
description: Schema for an Amplitude experiment or feature flag configuration including variants, targeting segments, and deployment settings.

id.description: The unique identifier for the experiment or flag.

projectId.description: The project ID the experiment belongs to.

key.description: The unique key used to reference the experiment or flag in code.

name.description: The display name of the experiment or flag.

description.description: A description of the experiment's purpose and hypothesis.

enabled.description: Whether the experiment or flag is currently enabled.

evaluationMode.description: The evaluation mode determining where variants are computed.

state.description: The lifecycle state of the experiment or flag.

bucketingKey.description: The user property used for deterministic bucketing.

bucketingSalt.description: The salt used with the bucketing key for hash computation.

variants.description: Array of variant configurations for the experiment.

segments.description: Array of targeting segments that control which users see which variants.

deployments.description: Array of deployment IDs where this experiment is active.

rolledOutVariant.description: The variant key that was rolled out after the experiment concluded.

startDate.description: The date and time the experiment started.

endDate.description: The date and time the experiment ended.

Variant.name: Variant
Variant.description: A variant in an experiment or feature flag.

key.description: The unique key identifying this variant.

name.description: The display name of the variant.

description.description: A description of what this variant does.

payload.description: An optional JSON payload associated with the variant for client-side configuration.

rolloutWeight.description: The traffic allocation percentage for this variant.

Segment.name: Segment
Segment.description: A targeting segment that defines which users receive a specific variant.

name.description: The display name of the segment.

conditions.description: Array of targeting conditions that must all be true for the segment to match.

variant.description: The variant key to assign when this segment matches.

percentage.description: The percentage of matching users to include.

Condition.name: Condition
Condition.description: A single targeting condition used in segment evaluation.
